title: Spiritual Flame Firearms
description: The fiery copper muskets is waiting for your manipulation......
body:
(Currently is)A simple weapon mod with the combination of the lower realm and copper as the theme, and other things may be added gradually in the future

The purpose of this mod is to facilitate the exploration of the Nether and to encourage further exploration of this mysterious dimension

The mod adds some Nether-style muskets and cold weapons, with more weapons and equipment to be added in the future.

Some firearms/weapons with special colors names have special attack effects

![Item of mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8819561a20ee7f20e3dafb26c7ce0d633db7f7da.png)

Experimental industrial systems will come soon...

This mod was originally prepared to test the preload mechanic that will be added with https://modrinth.com/mod/johanness-renaissancerebirth and for my fabric server. So there is no guarantee that it will continue to be updated

Note: Minecraft 1.21.8 MUST use 0.0.7ac version

Made by mcreator
